productDisplayName: Baggit Women Bleed Taj Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cm Crafted from genuine leatherette with a two-fold open style Looped and metal eyelets on the upper for style One main zippered compartment with nine card holders, one id card holder, two insert pockets A pocket on the front with magnetic closure and printed brand name for style Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
